aggregate_target.description: DarkPlaces/Quake spatial rendering plus Hapax compositor, drift, and effects capabilities as one governed runtime instrument.

required_compositor_ports.label: audio reactivity
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: A Screwm-native producer supplies tight, live audio-reactive state without depending on the retired Tauri frontend.

required_compositor_ports.label: drift/modulation currency
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Effect-drift scalars remain content-fresh, grounded in live signals, and visible at the engine/compositor boundary.

required_compositor_ports.label: WGSL node graph parity
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Shader vocabulary is either ported to DarkPlaces GLSL or explicitly preserved by a governed temporal compositor bridge.

required_compositor_ports.label: Cairo/ward atlas rendering
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Ward identity and live ward content remain available while engine-native dynamic-content ports mature.

required_compositor_ports.label: image/video classification
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Perceptual classification and diagnostic labels remain governed inputs to Screwm behavior, not frontend-only affordances.

required_compositor_ports.label: audio governance: ducking, LUFS panic, VAD, and consent egress
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Protected audio-governance controls are re-homed or preserved without bypassing MPC/L-12 routing invariants.

required_compositor_ports.label: layout switching and transition FSM
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Layout-mode decisions and transitions remain witnessed runtime behavior, not static template claims.

required_compositor_ports.label: director/programme control
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Director loop state can still influence program posture and visible composition under governed control.

required_compositor_ports.label: temporal/glfeedback effects
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Frame-history effects remain available through a bridge or a native accumulator until parity is proven.

required_compositor_ports.label: recording/HLS egress
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Recording and HLS output continuity remain first-class public-output evidence surfaces.

required_compositor_ports.label: camera resilience
required_compositor_ports.minimum_contract: Camera fallback producers, health state, and recovery behavior remain explicit Screwm aggregate obligations.

forbidden_interpretations: Treating hapax-logos inactivity as a regression by itself.
Using Tauri sunset as permission to remove studio-compositor behavior.
Shipping Screwm as DarkPlaces-only when required compositor ports are absent.
Counting advisory layout/config state as witnessed runtime layout success.
